issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card text states '[When Attacking]' which is an attack trigger.
Actions are completely wrong. DSL contains TrashFromHand and PlaySelf, but card effect is a blocker prevention ability with no card plays or discards.
Missing duration field. Effect applies 'during this battle' - should be duration: 'DuringOpponentTurn' or similar battle-specific duration.
Missing cost condition. Card requires [DON!! x1] to activate the effect - needs cost specification.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Your opponent cannot activate [Blocker] during this battle.
